extension.summary: Debrid-free URL resolver for Streamtape and DDownloads
extension.description: Zeus Resolvers is a lightweight Kodi Python module that resolves direct playable streams from selected file hosters (Streamtape, DDownloads) without requiring a Debrid subscription. Acts as a drop-in primary resolver with automatic fallback to ResolveURL for any other host.
extension.news: v1.0.1 - Streamtape: proper JS substring evaluation for the obfuscated token (was producing the wrong token -> 403 from CDN) - Streamtape + DDownloads: append Kodi `|User-Agent=...&Referer=...` to the resolved URL so the player passes the headers the CDN expects v1.0.0 - Initial release - Streamtape resolver (norobotlink/ideoooolink token extraction) - DDownloads resolver (two-step form POST + redirect capture) - Public API: zeusresolvers.resolve(url), zeusresolvers.can_resolve(url)
